text: Psychowaves - attacks entities with a beam attack, dealing a nausea effect to them.
Hypnosis - hypnotizes another player, turning him into an ally.
Remote control - controls an allied player.
Collective Consciousness: +20% damage; hypnotized player gains +10% damage.
Convergence: 15% chance to gain "Dash" for 15 sec on attack (also shared with hypnotized player).
